status.description: Status state constraint of this subscription

orderId.description: Associated Cashfree or Manual Order reference identifier

id.description: Unique purchase transaction ID matching orderId

orderId.description: Predefined order identifier corresponding to Cashfree payment ID

status.description: Status condition of current payment transactions

purchaseDate.description: Date-time when payment transaction was registered

paymentId.description: Verified transaction ID returned in webhook response from Cashfree

payments/{paymentId}.description: Payments initiated or completed by learners verified by Cashfree callback handler
